DESCRIPTION: The central hub connecting all realms. A place of safety and commerce.
A medieval fantasy realm of castles and dark forests where sword and sorcery reign.
A cyberpunk dystopia of neon-lit streets and corporate towers.
A noir cityscape where shadows hold secrets and nothing is as it seems.
A war-torn wasteland of military outposts and brutal survival.
Floating shards of reality drifting through a cosmic void.
Fragments of history frozen in time — gladiators and pharaohs and samurai.
A labyrinth of sewers and forgotten tunnels beneath the Nexus.
Specialized training facilities where warriors push beyond their limits.
The spirit realm where the dead train and the worthy are judged.
